steps.title: Use the no-real-solutions condition
steps.content: A quadratic has no real solutions when the expression under the square root in the quadratic formula is negative. For $kx^2-48x+12=0$, that condition is $$(-48)^2-4(k)(12)\lt0.$$ Simplify: $$2304-48k\lt0$$ so $$k\gt 48.$$

steps.title: Pick the least integer
steps.content: $k$ must be an integer greater than $48$, so the least possible integer is $k=49$. Therefore 49 is correct.
